input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule VE.2.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ve.2.2
            TITLE: push bar

            CONTENT:
            rule VE.2.2: Push Bar
VE.2.2 Push Bar 
Each vehicle must have a removable device which attaches to the rear of the vehicle that:  
a. Allows two people, standing erect behind the vehicle, to push the vehicle around the 
competition site 
b. Is capable of slowing and stopping the forward motion of the vehicle and pulling it 
rearwards

final_answer: Push Bar VE.2.2 Push Bar Each vehicle must have a removable device which attaches to the rear of the vehicle that: a. Allows two people, standing erect behind the vehicle, to push the vehicle around the competition site b. Is capable of slowing and stopping the forward motion of the vehicle and pulling it rearwards
